Opcode.name: PCM_OP_CUST_GET_NEWSFEED
Opcode.Doc: The opcode PCM_OP_CUST_GET_NEWSFEED is used to fetch newsfeed entries based on input parameters.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: Poid of the account for which newsfeed entries are requested.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Billinfo associated with the newsfeed object.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_START_T
Timestamp.Doc: Newsfeeds created at or after this timestamp will be fetched.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_END_T
Timestamp.Doc: Newsfeed entry with timetamp less than this timestamp will be fetched.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE_STR
String.Doc: Comma-separated values of type of newsfeed that must be retrieved

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT_FROM
Decimal.Doc: Newsfeed entry with amount greater than or equal to this amount will be fetched.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT_TO
Decimal.Doc: Newsfeed entry with amount lesser than this amount will be fetched.

String.name: PIN_FLD_LOCALE
String.Doc: Fetches localized string for the message and type in the requested locale. If absent, newsfeeds are returned as they were retrieved.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: Array of newsfeeds fetched based on the selection criteria.

Timestamp.name: PIN_FLD_MOD_T
Timestamp.Doc: Time the object was last modified.

String.name: PIN_FLD_READ_ACCESS
String.Doc: Read Access level for object. Valid values are S(Self), G(Global), L(BrandLineage), B(BrandGroup), A(Ancestral).

String.name: PIN_FLD_WRITE_ACCESS
String.Doc: Write Access level for object. Valid values are S(Self), G(Global), L(BrandLineage), B(BrandGroup), A(Ancestral).

String.name: PIN_FLD_MESSAGE
String.Doc: Combination of Id and value used for localizing details. If locale is passed in input, then this contains localized data.

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_OBJECT
Poid.Doc: Pointer to item, bill or other object related to newsfeed.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_RESOURCE_ID
Int.Doc: Numeric value of the resource that is impacted.

Enum.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE
Enum.Doc: Used to specify type of newsfeed entry.

String.name: PIN_FLD_TYPE_STR
String.Doc: Additional details related to type of newsfeed (e.g. Bill Unit Id)..

String.name: PIN_FLD_REASON_CODE
String.Doc: Localized string specifying the type of newsfeed. Passed only if locale was specified.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
